column16: 1. Validate @Valid on SignupRequest. 2. Check userRepository.existsByUsername() → 400 if taken. 3. Check userRepository.existsByEmail() → 400 if taken. 4. For role=admin: checks current session for ROLE_ADMIN authority → 403 if missing. 5. For role=doctor: validates staffId exists in physician table. 6. For role=nurse: validates staffId exists in nurse table. 7. For role=patient: validates patientSsn exists in patient table. 8. BCrypt-encodes password. 9. Saves User + Roles to DB.

column19: permitAll() in WebSecurityConfig; Admin role creation requires active ROLE_ADMIN session

column23: No – duplicate username/email check prevents true idempotency
